dsl_rule.translation_notes: Signal captures intraday reversion: (1) Price opens below daily pivot (entry condition 1), (2) Price stays above S1 support throughout the day (entry condition 2), (3) Price attempts to move higher shown by close > open (entry condition 3). Exit when price closes below S1, indicating support break. CPR reference treated as pivot-based. 'Dip type: intraday only' constrains hold_days_max to 1. 'Additional factors' noted but not explicitly quantifiable from allowed indicators.

backtest_rule.reason: Signal captures intraday reversion: (1) Price opens below daily pivot (entry condition 1), (2) Price stays above S1 support throughout the day (entry condition 2), (3) Price attempts to move higher shown by close > open (entry condition 3). Exit when price closes below S1, indicating support break. CPR reference treated as pivot-based. 'Dip type: intraday only' constrains hold_days_max to 1. 'Additional factors' noted but not explicitly quantifiable from allowed indicators.

source_rule_text: During an intraday dip, consider a stock for a buy when price stays above S1 (first support) and attempts to move higher, even if it opened below the daily pivot or CPR.
